research_basis: ADR guidance: capture context, options, outcome, tradeoffs, confidence, consequences.
Policy-as-code guidance: requirements should be encoded as testable policies with tests.
rules: CDR packet must satisfy all seven CDR pillars.
module_name must be semantic and cannot be UTILS.py, HELPERS.py, MISC.py, COMMON.py, or SHARED.py.
policy_checks must all PASS before implementation.
failure modes must include safe_state, strategy, detection, and severity.
integration_contract must declare inputs and outputs.
